name: iRay Technology Company Limited
summary: iRay Technology Company Limited develops, manufactures, and sells flat panel X-ray detectors for use in medical, dental, oncology, veterinary, security, and industrial imaging applications in China and internationally. It offers wireless radiography, tethered radiography, mammography, dynamic/real-time, and linear detector array products, as well as related software. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
